sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3699" key="a)krw/nuxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρώνῠχ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄνυξ</etym>) <sense id="n3699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with nails, claws, hoofs</tr_>, etc., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χερὸς ἀ ορώνυχα</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tips of fingers,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.82</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴχνος ἀ.</foreign> traces <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of one walking on his toes</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.317e</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">325b</biblScope> </bibl>:—<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρῶνυξ</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
